nasb.text: Now Moses was faithful in all His house as a servant, for a testimony of those things which were to be spoken later;

esv.text: Now Moses was faithful in all God’s house as a servant, to testify to the things that were to be spoken later,

cnv.text: 摩西不過是個僕人，在　神的全家盡忠，為以後要傳講的事作證；

ccb.text: 摩西以仆人的身份向上帝的全家尽忠，为将来要宣告的事做见证。

csbs.text: 摩西是做为仆人，对神的全家忠心，为将被述说的事做见证；
